definitions.passengerNevRetail: Domestic end-customer retail sales of passenger NEVs reported by CPCA.
definitions.passengerNevWholesale: Passenger NEV wholesale sales from automakers; includes vehicles that may be exported.
definitions.nevSalesCaam: CAAM NEV sales including domestic sales and exports; covers BEV, PHEV and fuel-cell vehicles.
definitions.companyReported: Company-reported deliveries or sales. Geography and product scope differ by brand and must not be summed as China domestic retail.
definitions.dealerInventoryCoefficient: Ending dealer inventory divided by sales for the month; above 1.5 is CADA's warning level.

market.historyPolicy: append-and-merge: existing market months are retained; fresh source values overwrite matching metric-month cells.

BYD.title: BYD Denza files all-electric N8 SUV, reviving short-lived nameplate
BYD.summary: The plug-in hybrid Denza N8 hit the market in August 2023 and was discontinued less than a year later.

BYD.title: BYD files all-new Seagull with larger body, optional LiDAR
BYD.summary: The all-new BYD Seagull is 425 mm longer at 4,205 mm, bringing its dimensions close to the pricier Dolphin.

BYD.title: BYD Denza files Z9S electric sedan to take on Xiaomi SU7
BYD.summary: The Denza Z9S measures 5,090 mm in length and offers two powertrain versions producing 320 kW (429 hp) and 370 kW.

BYD.title: BYD deepens Middle East push with 11.275 GWh storage deal for Abu Dhabi project
BYD.summary: BYD signed 11.275 GWh deal with UAE's Masdar to provide energy storage systems for the world's first GW-scale round-the-clock renewable energy project.

BYD.title: BYD Shark pickup appears in China regulatory filing 2 years after overseas launch
BYD.summary: The Shark pickup went on sale in Mexico in May 2024, and is now sold only in overseas markets.

BYD.title: Automakers' share in China NEV exports in June: BYD leads with 34.2%, Tesla 4th with 7.2%
BYD.summary: BYD dominated China's NEV export market in June with 170,897 units shipped, while Tesla China exported 36,171 units.

BYD.title: Automakers' share in China's NEV market in June: BYD leads with 22.3%, Tesla 5th for second consecutive month
BYD.summary: Nio's retail sales jumped 62.6% year-on-year in June, ranking 8th in China's NEV market.

BYD.title: Denza Z, BYD's answer to Porsche 911, debuts in UK
BYD.summary: The Denza Z comes in three variants and will open for pre-orders in the UK in October, with the earliest deliveries expected by year-end.

BYD.title: BYD's 17 millionth NEV rolls off line as newly launched Seal 08 takes milestone spot
BYD.summary: BYD's 17 millionth NEV comes just 82 days after its 16 millionth rolled off the line.

BYD.title: BYD follows Nio's relief efforts with donation to disaster-hit Guangxi
BYD.summary: Typhoon Maysak has affected 375,000 people in Guangxi, leaving 6 dead and 11 missing.

Nio.title: Nio kicks off 5-seat ES8 deliveries as its best-selling SUV eyes broader customer base
Nio.summary: ES8 deliveries fell 21.85% sequentially in June and the launch of the 5-seat version is expected to revive the model's momentum.

Nio.title: Nio says ES8 per-vehicle cost up nearly $3,000 on raw material price surge
Nio.summary: William Li said that Nio is working with its supply chain partners to find ways to offset some of the costs and strive to keep prices stable.

Nio.title: Nio launches 5-seat ES8 to broaden appeal of best-selling SUV
Nio.summary: The 5-seat ES8 starts at 382,800 yuan ($56,340) with battery included, 5.9% below 3-row version.

Nio.title: Nio June deliveries breakdown: ES9 hits stride, ES8 cools ahead of 5-seat variant launch
Nio.summary: The ES9 delivered 8,595 units in June, contributing 21.17% of Nio Inc's deliveries for the month in its first full delivery month.

Nio.title: Nio hits 150,000 cumulative deliveries in Shanghai, its home city
Nio.summary: As of the end of June, Nio Inc had delivered 1.19 million vehicles in China, with Shanghai accounting for more than one-tenth of that figure.

Nio.title: BYD follows Nio's relief efforts with donation to disaster-hit Guangxi
Nio.summary: Typhoon Maysak has affected 375,000 people in Guangxi, leaving 6 dead and 11 missing.

Nio.title: Nio supplier Seyond's Q2 LiDAR shipments surge 385% as Robin series takes off
Nio.summary: Seyond's total second-quarter LiDAR shipments reached about 271,100 units, up about 49% from the previous quarter.

Nio.title: Nio to start construction of Shanghai battery facility in H2, focusing on next-gen technology
Nio.summary: The project, when completed, will house 31 lithium battery testing laboratories, 1 lithium-ion cell pilot line and 1 battery pack line.

Nio.title: Nio sets 5-seat ES8 launch event for 7:30 pm on July 9
Nio.summary: The launch event for the 5-seat Nio ES8 will begin at 7:30 pm Beijing Time on July 9. Users can watch it via Nio's official livestream.

Nio.title: Nio brand's average selling price hits $65,300 in June as flagship SUV boosts premium pricing power
Nio.summary: The Nio brand's average transaction price reached 443,000 yuan ($65,300) in June, as deliveries of the ES9, which starts at 498,000 yuan, ramped up.

Xpeng.title: Xpeng June deliveries breakdown: Mona M03 contributes over 35%, GX surges into second place
Xpeng.summary: Mona M03 delivered 14,197 units in June, retaining its position as the best-selling Xpeng model.

Xpeng.title: Xpeng CEO takes company's first robotaxi ride as internal testing begins
Xpeng.summary: Xpeng has completed the first order of its robotaxi closed beta, with chairman and CEO He Xiaopeng becoming the first user.

Xpeng.title: Xpeng plans 2 more Mona models as budget lineup expands to at least 5 vehicles
Xpeng.summary: Xpeng is planning an A-segment SUV and a station wagon for the Mona lineup, codenamed D11 and D11T respectively.

Xpeng.title: Xpeng delivers 1,300 EVs to Car Inc, deepening mobility push
Xpeng.summary: Car Inc has bought over 5,000 Xpeng vehicles to date and plans to purchase at least 5,000 more within the next year.

Xpeng.title: Xpeng's He echoes Nio's Li on China NEV penetration topping 90%
Xpeng.summary: Xpeng chairman He Xiaopeng expects China's NEV penetration to exceed 90% by 2030.

Xpeng.title: Xpeng to lift GX output 10% this month, eyes top-three segment spot
Xpeng.summary: Xpeng GX delivered 6,739 units in June, with the 10,000th vehicle rolling off the line on July 1.

Xpeng.title: Deutsche Bank sees Xpeng Mona L03 SUV selling 12,500 units a month
Xpeng.summary: Deutsche Bank analysts expect the Mona L03 to average about 12,500 units in monthly sales, replicating the success of the Mona M03 sedan.

Xpeng.title: Xpeng Mona L03 makes China debut with pre-sales open, launch set for July 16
Xpeng.summary: Xpeng Mona L03 pre-sales start at 143,800 yuan ($21,200), with both battery electric and extended-range powertrain options available.

Xpeng.title: Xpeng June deliveries hit 2026 high as GX SUV ramps up
Xpeng.summary: Xpeng delivered 40,126 vehicles in June, up 15.93% year-on-year, a monthly high for 2026 so far.

Xpeng.title: Xpeng loses another robotics veteran as production push nears
Xpeng.summary: Mi Liangchuan, head of Xpeng's robotics business, has departed recently, becoming the second key executive to leave its robotics team within a month.

Li Auto.title: Li Auto's i9 SUV shows up in regulatory filing as company expands BEV lineup
Li Auto.summary: The Li i9 has a body length of 5,225 mm and a wheelbase of 3,168 mm, with a dual-motor layout and combined system power of 400 kW.

Li Auto.title: Li Auto June deliveries breakdown: i6 retains top spot, revamped L9 surges
Li Auto.summary: Li i6 delivered 21,453 units in June, accounting for a 69.44% share of Li Auto's total deliveries.

Li Auto.title: Li Auto teases i9, its largest SUV yet, with September launch planned
Li Auto.summary: Li i9 measures 5,225 mm in length with a 3,168 mm wheelbase, significantly larger than the current all-electric flagship Li i8.

Li Auto.title: Li Auto sets July 16 for revamped L6 SUV launch to revive slumping sales
Li Auto.summary: Li Auto will launch the next-generation Li L6 on July 16, delivering a revamp of one of its best-selling models.

Li Auto.title: Li Auto's new L6 set for potential price hike as costs surge
Li Auto.summary: Rising prices for memory chips and lithium carbonate are putting unprecedented cost pressure on nearly all new vehicles.

Li Auto.title: Li Auto revamps structure to speed up product decisions
Li Auto.summary: Li Auto plans to split off some key functions of its product department and merge them into its R&D division.

Li Auto.title: Li Auto June deliveries fall almost 15% as sales pressure persists
Li Auto.summary: Li Auto delivered a cumulative 193,472 vehicles in the first half, down 5.13% from a year earlier.

Li Auto.title: Li Auto enters Macau with localized EVs for cross-border drivers
Li Auto.summary: Li Auto opened its first retail center in Macau, showcasing the i6 and i8 electric models.

Li Auto.title: Analysts see upgraded Li L8 averaging 5,000 units in monthly sales
Li Auto.summary: Analysts say the new-generation Li L8 has an aggressive pricing strategy, which is linked to weaker orders for the Li L9 in June.

Li Auto.title: Li Auto launches revamped L8 SUV with in-house chip, 430-km battery range
Li Auto.summary: The revamped Li L8 switches from a six-seat to a five-seat layout, with a higher starting price than its predecessor.

Tesla China.title: Tesla files new Model Y variant in China, likely Performance version
Tesla China.summary: The new Model Y variant tops out at 250 km/h, with performance specs exceeding all versions currently on sale.

Tesla China.title: Tesla June China deliveries breakdown: Model Y dominates, Model 3 weakness deepens
Tesla China.summary: Tesla delivered 52,920 vehicles in China in June, of which Model Y accounted for 38,654 units, or 73.04%.

Tesla China.title: Automakers' share in China NEV exports in June: BYD leads with 34.2%, Tesla 4th with 7.2%
Tesla China.summary: BYD dominated China's NEV export market in June with 170,897 units shipped, while Tesla China exported 36,171 units.

Tesla China.title: Automakers' share in China's NEV market in June: BYD leads with 22.3%, Tesla 5th for second consecutive month
Tesla China.summary: Nio's retail sales jumped 62.6% year-on-year in June, ranking 8th in China's NEV market.

Tesla China.title: Tesla's China deliveries fall below 30% of global total for first time since late 2020
Tesla China.summary: Tesla delivered 126,157 vehicles in China in the second quarter, down 2.05% year-on-year and accounting for just 26.28% of its global deliveries.

Tesla China.title: BYD's BEV sales beat Tesla again in Q2 despite US EV maker's strong rebound
Tesla China.summary: BYD sold 557,090 BEVs in the second quarter, about 77,000 units more than Tesla's 480,126.

Tesla China.title: Tesla China's June wholesale volume hits 2026 monthly high as growth streak extends
Tesla China.summary: Tesla China's wholesale volume reached 89,091 units in June, up 24.43% year-on-year, marking the 8th consecutive month of growth.

Tesla China.title: Li Auto exec says Tesla FSD stands alone, urges peers to face the gap
Tesla China.summary: There is no system other than Tesla's FSD that can rank among the first tier, a Li Auto executive said.

Tesla China.title: Automakers' share in China's NEV exports in May: BYD ranks first with 36.7%, Tesla 4th with 9.1%
Tesla China.summary: BYD dominated China's NEV export market in May with 155,944 units exported, while Tesla China exported 38,701 units.

Tesla China.title: Automakers' share in China's NEV market in May: BYD ranks first with 21.8%, Tesla returns to top five
Tesla China.summary: Tesla's retail sales in China rebounded sharply to 47,281 units in May, returning to the top 10 NEV list and entering the top 10 in the overall passenger car market.

Zeekr.title: Zeekr kicks off pre-sales of 5-seat 9X to broaden flagship SUV's appeal
Zeekr.summary: Zeekr's move echoes rivals' actions. Nio will officially launch the five-seat ES8 SUV on July 9.

Zeekr.title: Zeekr to begin pre-sales for five-seat version of 9X SUV on July 8
Zeekr.summary: The five-seat version of the Zeekr 9X will open for pre-sales on July 8, broadening the customer base for the flagship model.

Zeekr.title: Zeekr delivers record 35,169 vehicles in June
Zeekr.summary: Zeekr delivered 35,169 vehicles in June, setting a record for the third consecutive month.

Zeekr.title: Zeekr cumulative deliveries top 800,000 as premium models drive growth
Zeekr.summary: Zeekr's shooting brake family has reached nearly 380,000 in cumulative deliveries.

Zeekr.title: Zeekr's May deliveries hit record high as premium models drive growth
Zeekr.summary: Zeekr delivered 34,377 vehicles in May, surging 81.81% year-on-year.

Zeekr.title: Zeekr offers limited additional sales of 001 anniversary edition to sustain growth
Zeekr.summary: The Zeekr 001 Fifth Anniversary Edition starts at 365,000 yuan ($53,920) and focuses on extreme track performance.

Zeekr.title: Zeekr upgrades flagship 009 MPV with 900V architecture and faster charging
Zeekr.summary: The premium electric MPV is offered in six- and seven-seat versions, with higher-trim models upgraded to a 900-volt high-voltage architecture.

Zeekr.title: Zeekr sets May 19 launch for revamped 009 MPV
Zeekr.summary: The updated Zeekr 009 opened for pre-sales on April 24, with customer test drives starting on May 9.

Zeekr.title: Zeekr April deliveries hit record high as 9X remains strong
Zeekr.summary: Zeekr's April deliveries surged 132% year-on-year to 31,787 units, with the 9X hybrid SUV topping 10,000 units again.

Zeekr.title: Zeekr 9X to be exported to Middle East in June, enter Europe in Q4
Zeekr.summary: The Zeekr 9X is the Zeekr brand's first hybrid model, with a starting price of 465,900 yuan ($68,180) in China.

Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi's Sky Nomad SUVs surface in regulatory filing, including camping version with lifting roof
Xiaomi EV.summary: All 4 Sky Nomad models are extended-range vehicles, with the N90 Max Camping Edition featuring a pop-up roof.

Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi shares first HD exterior image of Sky Nomad SUV, confirms N90 name
Xiaomi EV.summary: Xiaomi released the first complete HD exterior image of the debut Sky Nomad model, revealing that the large SUV is named the N90.

Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi details Sky Nomad SUV with images of transformable interior
Xiaomi EV.summary: Xiaomi showed the interior space of the Sky Nomad's first model for the first time, with rotating front-row seats and an in-car "bar counter" that can be set up.

Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi EV says Sky Nomad is new series, offers first look at new SUV
Xiaomi EV.summary: Xiaomi EV said Sky Nomad is its second product series after the SU7/YU7 series, positioned as an "intelligent, transformable large-space SUV."

Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi EV June deliveries rise 36% as new YU7 variants lift sales
Xiaomi EV.summary: Xiaomi EV's June deliveries rose 36.45% year-on-year and 6.04% from the previous month, marking the third consecutive month above the 30,000-unit mark.

Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi officially unveils Sky Nomad name, possibly new brand or series for EREV SUV push
Xiaomi EV.summary: Xiaomi EV officially announced the Sky Nomad name, calling it "a new name about space and life."

Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi EV says it delivered over 30,000 units again in June
Xiaomi EV.summary: This marks the third straight month that Xiaomi EV has topped 30,000 deliveries. No specific figure was disclosed.

Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi touts self-driving feat as YU7 GT laps Nürburgring autonomously
Xiaomi EV.summary: Xiaomi YU7 GT set the world's first autonomous-driving lap record at the Nürburgring with a time of 10 minutes, 29.483 seconds.

Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi cleared to build extended-range EVs at Beijing plant as new SUV launch looms
Xiaomi EV.summary: The approval clears a key regulatory hurdle for Xiaomi's rumored extended-range SUV, expected to launch in the second half of this year.

Xiaomi EV.title: Xiaomi EV delivers 32,759 vehicles in May as YU7 continues to slide
Xiaomi EV.summary: Xiaomi EV's May deliveries rose 16.94% year-on-year, but fell 10.74% from April.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor previews LiDAR-equipped A05s compact EV in push toward 1 million delivery goal
Leapmotor.summary: The Leapmotor A05s is the second A-series model after the A10, offering roof-mounted LiDAR.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor to launch updated B01, B10 on July 16 as product offensive continues
Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor's two revamped B-series models will officially go on sale on July 16, after opening for pre-orders in China on July 8.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor starts taking pre-orders for refreshed B01, B10 as product blitz continues
Leapmotor.summary: The refresh of Leapmotor's two B-series models extends the update cadence of its C-series, aimed at supporting a target of delivering 1 million vehicles in 2026.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor brings A10-based B03X crossover to Europe at double its China price
Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor B03X features a 145 kW motor, a significant power boost over China's A10.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor enters Mexico, marking first step into North America
Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor's B10 SUV has started deliveries in Mexico, becoming the brand's first model to enter North America.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor chairman buys more shares again as stock hovers near 16-month low
Leapmotor.summary: This is the second stake increase by Leapmotor's chairman within a month, bringing the combined purchases over the past six months to about HK$900 million.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor June deliveries jump 95% to fresh monthly high
Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor delivered 93,376 vehicles globally in June, a new monthly record.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor enters MPV market with D99 launch
Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor's first MPV, the D99, goes on sale starting at 249,800 yuan ($36,790).

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor tops 1.5 million deliveries, launches Lafa 5 in Hong Kong
Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor's cumulative global deliveries reached 1.5 million units, taking just 8 months to climb from 1 million to 1.5 million.

Leapmotor.title: Leapmotor refreshes top-selling SUV trio in bid to sustain growth
Leapmotor.summary: Leapmotor launched updated versions of the C10, C11 and C16, with starting prices as low as 125,800 yuan ($18,620).

Huawei HIMA.title: GAC-Huawei brand Aistaland files second model GX7 as brand expands beyond GT7
Huawei HIMA.summary: The Aistaland GX7 is 5,099 mm long, with pure-electric range of up to 305 km.

Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei HIMA posts first delivery drop in a year in June
Huawei HIMA.summary: Huawei HIMA delivered 50,624 vehicles in June, down 3.73% year-on-year, though up 9.76% from the previous month.

Huawei HIMA.title: GAC and Huawei's Aistaland enters premium EV race with GT7 shooting brake
Huawei HIMA.summary: Aistaland GT7 starts at 209,900 yuan ($30,880), featuring Huawei's latest ADS 5 smart driving system.

Huawei HIMA.title: Maextro unveils two ultra-luxury MPVs, expanding premium lineup
Huawei HIMA.summary: Maextro V800 carries a pre-sales price starting at 800,000 yuan ($117,810), while the V680 starts at 650,000 yuan.

Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei-backed Maextro launches S800 Grand Design, deepening push into ultra-luxury market
Huawei HIMA.summary: The Maextro S800 Grand Design starts at 1.388 million yuan ($204,400), taking aim at Mercedes-Benz Maybach.

Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei-backed Maextro to debut V800 luxury MPV on June 25
Huawei HIMA.summary: The Maextro V800 is poised to become China's first MPV with a price tag reaching 1 million yuan ($147,600).

Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei-backed Aistaland to launch first model GT7 shooting-brake on June 26
Huawei HIMA.summary: Aistaland GT7 opened pre-sales on May 29, with a starting pre-sales price of 219,900 yuan ($32,460).

Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei's premium driver-assist package to cost more on chip prices
Huawei HIMA.summary: The actual purchase cost of Huawei's Qiankun ADS advanced feature package will rise by 3,000 yuan ($440).

Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei-SAIC brand Shangjie launches refreshed H5 SUV with upgraded Huawei smart driving system
Huawei HIMA.summary: Updated Shangjie H5 starts at 159,800 yuan ($23,510), unchanged from its predecessor.

Huawei HIMA.title: Huawei HIMA brings in battery suppliers beyond CATL in cost-cutting push
Huawei HIMA.summary: Smaller battery makers' quotes run about 10% below CATL's, aiding HIMA's expansion in the mass market.

assumptions: Missing brand-month cells are kept as null and are not estimated.
BYD uses CnEVPost NEV sales; Tesla China uses CnEVPost monthly sales including exports.
Historical months already saved in china-ev-data.json are retained when CnEVPost source pages stop listing them.
Latest news is scraped from each CnEVPost brand page and limited to 10 items per brand.
Company-reported brand series and China domestic retail market series are kept separate and are never summed together.
When a company discloses only a threshold such as 'more than 30,000', the exact monthly value is kept null rather than estimated.
historyPolicy: append-and-merge: existing months are retained; fresh CnEVPost values overwrite matching brand-month cells.
